sections.paragraph:
(prop. inf. abs. Hiphil, from the root בּוּן, for הָכֵן, הָכֵין establishing, Ch. הָכֵיז, הָכֵי [“Others i.q. כֵּן with א prosthetic.”]) adv.-

(1) of affirming strongly, surely! Gen 28:16 Exo 2:14 Jer 8:8.-(2) adversat. but, yet, Psa 31:23 Isa 49:4 53:4 . Hence, by abbreviation, is אַךְ, which see. [This obs. is omitted in Ges. corr.]
